description: Guardian was a publication covering national and international news. It was established in 1948 and is published 46 times a year by the Institute for Independent Social Journalism. The publication's articles covered a wide range of subjects, including politics, social movements, civil rights, labor rights, environmental activism, and global events. Each issue included in-depth analysis, investigative reporting, opinion pieces, and interviews with influential figures. Publication History National Guardian 0362-5583 Formerly (until 1968) USA United States
subject: Social Sciences
title: Guardian
